publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-05-19 00:01:24 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Photographs taken for the Cornell Daily Sun, the Cornellian, and the Ithaca Journal of events in and around Ithaca. Subjects include parades and floats; fraternities, particularly Pi Kappa Alpha; and the 1958 riots around President Malott's house.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Wegryn was a phtographer and photo editor for the Cornell Daily Sun, 1955-1959.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photographs taken for the Cornell Daily Sun, the Cornellian, and the Ithaca Journal of events in and around Ithaca. Subjects include parades and floats; fraternities, particularly Pi Kappa Alpha; and the 1958 riots around President Malott's house.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Robert Louis Wegryn photonegatives, #37-05-2192. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

: Barbara and Lola - White Statue, Libe Slope

Sun Sign-Ups - Girls Sign Up for Sun at Registration
YASNY, You Ain't Seen Nothing Yet, student organization that decorated Barton Hall for the big-band fall and spring weekend dances.
